source_pr.title: oomtest: fix data race in the oomCapture
source_pr.body:

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: oomtest: fix data race in the oomCapture
failure_signature: oomtest: fix data race in the oomCapture
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a concurrency data race in the OOM test helper (`oomCapture`) where shared state was accessed from multiple goroutines without proper synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by making the capture helper goroutine-safe (e.g., using locks/atomics) to eliminate the data race.
fix_pattern: Make shared test helper state (e.g., `oomCapture`) goroutine-safe using locks/atomics to eliminate data races.

evidence: evidence: oomtest: fix data race in the oomCapture
